abilities.name: Collective Focus
abilities.description: Rank Value +8: Treat as equal to Condition value. Does not add Rank to Defense.

abilities.name: Multiple Bodies
abilities.description: No Wounds; damage reduces Rank Value by 1, unless blast (b) or immune (i) damage, reduced by full amount. At 0 Rank Value, last Zombie slain.

abilities.name: Shambling
abilities.description: Gains Slow at start of each turn during Dramatic Time.

abilities.name: Zombie Curse
abilities.description: Any Living killed by this character animates as Mindless Zombie after 1 hour.

actions: (1) Pulled into the Horde (Pugilism) | AV: 3 (varies) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers damage equal to Rank Value.
(0) Surge Forward | Move this character up to 5 yards in any direction, then reduce Rank Value Condition by 1.
system.notes: Collective horde of mindless undead zombies. Moves as swarm. Shambles forward slowly. Growing curse animates slain Living as zombies. Multiple bodies health pool.
